notes: Source: Live scrape of AVR-X1600H web UI, 2026-05-07
Entry point is /general/general.html. JS/CSS/XML links are followed one level.
Bug B-1 fix required: src= and href= HTML attributes now parsed.
Bug B-2 fix required: JS code fragments no longer mistaken for URL paths.

endpoints.name: general.html

expected_fields.Firmware Version: Version label exposed by the web UI; verify meaning before treating it as AVR mainboard firmware

endpoints.notes: Primary web UI entry point. Serves status and version labels; do not assume HEOS/AIOS firmware is AVR mainboard firmware.

endpoints.name: ajax/globals/get_config
endpoints.notes: AJAX endpoint discovered from web UI JS. Same as AppCommand GET surface on port 10443 (HTTPS).

endpoints.name: JS bundles (minified)
endpoints.notes: jQuery and app JS bundles. Scraped for further endpoint discovery. Bug B-2: JS token splitter must reject code fragments.

endpoints.name: CSS assets
endpoints.notes: Stylesheet assets. Discovered via href= attribute extraction (Bug B-1 fix).
